# oag (OpenAPI Generator)

> An OpenAPI 3.x code generator with a plugin-style Rust workspace architecture. Generates TypeScript/Node API clients (zero runtime dependencies), React/SWR hooks, and Python FastAPI server stubs with Pydantic v2 models. Supports full $ref resolution, Server-Sent Events, test generation, three layout modes (bundled, modular, split), and configurable naming strategies.

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/urmzd/oag/blob/main/README.md): Installation, CLI reference, configuration, and examples
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/urmzd/oag/blob/main/AGENTS.md): Architecture and development guide
- [CHANGELOG](https://github.com/urmzd/oag/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): Version history
- [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/urmzd/oag/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): Setup, workflow, adding generators, and publishing

## API / Key Files

- [crates/oag-core/src/](https://github.com/urmzd/oag/blob/main/crates/oag-core/src/): IR, parser, config, transform pipeline, CodeGenerator trait
- [crates/oag-cli/src/main.rs](https://github.com/urmzd/oag/blob/main/crates/oag-cli/src/main.rs): CLI entry point
- [crates/oag-node-client/](https://github.com/urmzd/oag/blob/main/crates/oag-node-client/): TypeScript/Node client generator
- [crates/oag-react-swr-client/](https://github.com/urmzd/oag/blob/main/crates/oag-react-swr-client/): React/SWR hooks generator
- [crates/oag-fastapi-server/](https://github.com/urmzd/oag/blob/main/crates/oag-fastapi-server/): Python FastAPI server generator
- [crates/oag-core/default-config.yaml](https://github.com/urmzd/oag/blob/main/crates/oag-core/default-config.yaml): Default oag.yaml config
- [examples/](https://github.com/urmzd/oag/blob/main/examples/): Working examples (petstore, sse-chat)

## Optional

- [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/urmzd/oag/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): How to contribute
- [Skill](https://github.com/urmzd/oag/blob/main/skills/openapi-generate/SKILL.md): Agent skill
